quotes.quote: The growth curves are smoothed, after which biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted. Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.
quotes.rationale: Statistical analysis of physically measured growth curves judges hypothesis confirmation and the result updates the domain model, i.e. memory.

quotes.quote: This is a system which uses techniques from artificial intelligence to automate all aspects of the scientific discovery process: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses, runs the physical experiments using robotic systems, analyses and interprets the resulting data, and repeats the cycle.
quotes.rationale: Establishes the closed cycle in which analysis of robotic physical experiments feeds back into the next round.

quotes.quote: Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae. Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].
quotes.rationale: A reported aggregate outcome (12 of 20 hypotheses confirmed) presented as a summary result rather than as routed feedback.

quotes.quote: Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.
quotes.rationale: Self-assessment of the system's discovery claim, terminal in this source.

quotes.quote: There is a substantial cost for these systems, not only in initial capital outlay and user training, but also in ongoing servicing and maintenance costs, and we would not currently consider them to be 'cost-effective' in comparison to human scientists.
quotes.rationale: An authorial judgment comparing system value to human scientists; a terminal narrative assessment, not routed into the system loop.

diagnostics.consequence: Reliability of the confirm/refute decision rule cannot be coded above not_evaluated, so the closure claim rests on unvalidated internal judgments.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae. Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].

diagnostics.statement: No reliability study (agreement, discrimination, bias, or calibration analysis) is reported for any validator channel; the 'high degree of confidence' claim for confirmed hypotheses is asserted without a reported study design.

diagnostics.consequence: Memory-admission criteria for negative results remain unclear, limiting the derived closure judgment for the main loop.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae. Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].

The growth curves are smoothed, after which biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted. Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.

diagnostics.statement: The disposition of the hypotheses that were not confirmed, and whether refutation feeds the model update differently from confirmation, is not described in the packet.

diagnostics.consequence: Validator, memory, and policy authority must be coded not_reported, so oversight of the automated confirm/refute decisions cannot be assessed.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam is intended to be fully automated, with human intervention required only to supply library strain stocks and consumables.

diagnostics.statement: Human authority over validation, memory admission, and policy is not stated; the packet only reports that humans supply strain stocks and consumables.

diagnostics.consequence: All channels code as internal, so no independent check constrains overstated performance claims.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.

diagnostics.statement: No external or independent evaluation of the system's discoveries is reported; the discovery claim is a self-assessment within the same source.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam conceived 20 hypotheses concerning the identity of genes encoding 13 locally orphan enzymes in S. cerevisiae. Adam tested all these hypotheses on its robotic system and was able to confirm by experimentation, with a high degree of confidence, the correctness of 12 of them [24].
Adam has already proven itself by discovering new knowledge [24], whilst Eve is still under development.

recommendations.proposed_action: Report a property-specific validation of the automated confirm/refute rule, such as independent re-testing of a sample of confirmed and unconfirmed hypotheses, with error rates.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Rates reported with uncertainty intervals for a pre-specified sample including unconfirmed hypotheses
success_check.evidence_needed: Replication results from an evaluator not producing the original robotic runs
success_check.observable: Published false-confirmation and false-refutation rates for the automated hypothesis decision rule against independent re-testing

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The growth curves are smoothed, after which biologically significant parameters are extracted and statistically analysed to determine whether the original hypotheses have been confirmed or refuted. Scientific knowledge gained from this process is used to update the model of yeast metabolism.
Finally, there is a comprehensive custom-made relational database that stores all the data and meta-data generated throughout the various stages (MySQL).

recommendations.proposed_action: Document explicitly how refuted hypotheses are handled in the model update, including any admission criteria applied before knowledge enters the metabolism model or the database.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Rule covers both confirmed and refuted outcomes with the decision threshold made explicit
success_check.evidence_needed: System description or logged traces of model updates for a full experimental cycle
success_check.observable: A stated memory-admission rule mapping confirm/refute outcomes to model and database updates

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Adam is intended to be fully automated, with human intervention required only to supply library strain stocks and consumables.

This is a system which uses techniques from artificial intelligence to automate all aspects of the scientific discovery process: it generates hypotheses from a computer model of the domain, designs experiments to test these hypotheses, runs the physical experiments using robotic systems, analyses and interprets the resulting data, and repeats the cycle.

recommendations.proposed_action: Specify the human roles that remain over validation, memory admission, and policy setting rather than only over consumable supply.

success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Each role assigned a stated authority level or explicit absence of human involvement
success_check.evidence_needed: Operating-procedure documentation covering an unattended experimental cycle
success_check.observable: An explicit statement of human authority for each of generator, executor, validator, memory, and policy

memory_structure: computer model of yeast metabolism updated with gained scientific knowledge
comprehensive custom-made relational database (MySQL) of all data and meta-data
policy_type: model-driven hypothesis generation and experiment design over a computer model of the domain
cycle repetition driven by statistically analysed experimental outcomes
